ashram.name: Ma Sharanam Ashram
ashram.location: On the banks of the holy river Narmada

gurukul.title: Ma Sharanam Gurukul
gurukul.description: A residential school where students live and learn free of cost, preserving ancient traditions and values.

school.title: Ma Sharanam School
school.description: Providing quality education free for all, empowering the local community and children.

gaushala.title: Gaushala
gaushala.description: Serving and protecting indigenous cows, promoting cow-based agriculture and health.

organic_farming.title: Organic Agriculture
organic_farming.description: Practicing sustainable and chemical-free farming on the fertile lands of the Narmada.

archery.title: Archery Excellence
archery.description: Our students practice traditional archery and have won gold medals at the national level.

satsang.title: Daily Satsang
satsang.description: Daily Matri Vani sessions and weekly live Zoom sessions on Sundays with Swami ji.
